# ends_with

Checks if a string ends with a given substring.

## Signature

`ends_with(_val: str, _end: str) -> bool`

## Examples

```rad
ends_with("hello world", "world")    // -> true
ends_with("hello world", "hello")    // -> false
```

## Category

strings
